name: Infrastructure Feature Request

## 🚀 Feature Request
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen -->

## 🎯 Use Case
<!-- Describe the use case or business need -->

## 🌍 Environment
<!-- Which environments should this apply to -->
- [ ] Development
- [ ] Staging
- [ ] Production
- [ ] All environments

## 📋 Requirements
<!-- List specific requirements -->
- [ ] Requirement 1
- [ ] Requirement 2
- [ ] Requirement 3

## 🔧 Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe your proposed solution -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
<!-- Describe alternatives you've considered -->

## 💰 Cost Impact
<!-- Estimated cost impact -->
- [ ] No additional cost
- [ ] Low cost increase (< $100/month)
- [ ] Medium cost increase ($100-$500/month)
- [ ] High cost increase (> $500/month)
- [ ] Cost savings expected

## 🔒 Security Considerations
<!-- Any security considerations -->

## 📅 Timeline
<!-- When is this needed -->
- [ ] ASAP
- [ ] Within 1 week
- [ ] Within 1 month
- [ ] No specific timeline

## 🌐 Additional Context
<!-- Any other context or screenshots -->
